label: User Interviews
definition: Interviews with IS buyers and users conducted by Aberdeen analysts

label: Product Eval
definition: Direct evaluation of vendor product capabilities

label: Analyst Assessment
definition: Aberdeen analyst expert assessment and opinion

label: Web Research
definition: Post-publication web research to verify outcomes

label: Document
definition: Factual data extracted directly from the study document

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classification of entity competitive or business strategy

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking prediction about market or technology viability

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified post-publication actual outcome of a prediction or trend

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Assessment of a technology capability, state, or characteristic

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Expert analyst opinion not constituting a formal prediction

label: Market Data
definition: Factual market data, sizing, or share information

label: Benchmark
definition: Performance benchmark result from standard industry test (e.g., TPC)

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative performance measurement from a formal or informal benchmark

label: Framework Factor
definition: A criterion or dimension in an analyst's evaluative framework
